title: Pizza Hut India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Pizza Hut India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
